text: 帮我检查下项目给出个审计报告和 改进意见

blocks.text: I'm here to help you with software engineering tasks. What would you like to work on?
你好！有什么我可以帮助你的吗？
帮我检查下项目给出个审计报告和 改进意见
I'll analyze this project and provide an audit report with improvement recommendations. Let me start by exploring the project structure.
